---
title: 'Signature'
date: '2050-09-01T23:11:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Dirty Pastor'
blogger_status: 'SCHEDULED'
blogger_post_id: '4422540856946615964'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Dirty Pastor/feed.atom'
---

<p>&nbsp;</p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><div>Thanks for listening,&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><div>The Dirty Pastor, Sex. Christianity. Education.&nbsp;</div>
